name: Emblasoft Evolver (Functional Testing)
description: Functional testing capability within Evolver for validating network features and updates, supporting CI/CD schedules. Any scenario can be modelled for proving service capabilities in multi-vendor networks.
howItWorks: Evolver's functional testing mode validates features and updates against defined scenarios. Flexibility allows any scenario to be modelled for proving service capabilities in multi-vendor networks. REST API integration ensures alignment with CI/CD/CT workflows.
